ddls:
CREATE TABLE "restaurants" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant */,
  "country_code" INTEGER /* Country code of the restaurant's location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the restaurant is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the restaurant */,
  "locality" TEXT /* Locality of the restaurant */,
  "locality_verbose" TEXT /* Verbose locality of the restaurant */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the restaurant's location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the restaurant's location */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the restaurant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the restaurant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the restaurant */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the restaurant */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Social media links of the restaurant */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the restaurant */,
  "wheelchair_accessible" INTEGER /* Indicates if the restaurant is wheelchair accessible */,
  "smoking_area" INTEGER /* Indicates if the restaurant has a designated smoking area */,
  "delivery_service" INTEGER /* Indicates if the restaurant offers delivery service */,
  "takeout_service" INTEGER /* Indicates if the restaurant offers takeout service */,
  "payment_options" TEXT /* List of accepted payment methods */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurants_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cuisines" (
  "cuisine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cuisine */,
  "cuisine_name" TEXT /* Name of the cuisine */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cuisine */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Country or region of origin for the cuisine */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity metric of the cuisine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cuisine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurant_cuisines" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant */,
  "cuisine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cuisine */,
  "primary_cuisine" INTEGER /* Indicates if the cuisine is the primary cuisine of the restaurant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id", "cuisine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_ranges" (
  "price_range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price range */,
  "price_range" TEXT /* Price range of the restaurant */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the price range */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the price range is denominated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurant_price_ranges" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant */,
  "price_range_id" INTEGER /* ID of the price range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id", "price_range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, restaurant owner, customer) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "verification_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's account is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was created */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the review has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the review has received */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was last edited */,
  "response" TEXT /* Text of the restaurant owner's response to the review */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date and time the response was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant being rated */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the restaurant */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the restaurant */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the order */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant where the order was made */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  "delivery_method" TEXT /* Method of delivery (e.g., dine-in, takeout, delivery) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the item belongs to */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item */,
  "item_cost" REAL /* Cost of the item */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item in the menu */,
  "special_instructions" TEXT /* Special instructions for the item (e.g., no onions, extra sauce) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES menu_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the payment belongs to */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the payment transaction */,
  "payment_gateway" TEXT /* Payment gateway used (e.g., PayPal, Stripe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "table_bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant where the booking was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the booking */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date the booking was made */,
  "table_number" INTEGER /* Number of the table booked */,
  "time_slot" TEXT /* Time slot for the booking (e.g., 6:00 PM - 8:00 PM) */,
  "guests" INTEGER /* Number of guests for the booking */,
  "special_requests" TEXT /* Special requests for the booking (e.g., high chair, baby seat) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_table_bookings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_table_bookings_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deliveries" (
  "delivery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being delivered */,
  "delivery_address" TEXT /* Address where the order is being delivered */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date the delivery is scheduled for */,
  "delivery_status" TEXT /* Status of the delivery (e.g., pending, delivered) */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver who is making the delivery */,
  "estimated_delivery_time" TEXT /* Estimated time of delivery */,
  "actual_delivery_time" TEXT /* Actual time of delivery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delivery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deliveries_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deliveries_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menu_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each menu item */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant that offers the item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the menu item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the menu item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the menu item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the menu item (e.g., appetizer, main course) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the menu item */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Indicates if the menu item is available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the driver */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the driver */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the driver */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle used by the driver */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the driver's vehicle */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)
